description.name: Hetzner Cloud VPS
description.tagline: Automated provisioning and management of Hetzner Cloud virtual servers.
description.long: This module allows you to automate the deployment, sizing, suspension, and deletion of Hetzner Cloud VPS instances in WHMCS, while providing clients with a state-of-the-art management console.
features: Perform Power On, Power Off, and Reboot from Client Area
Request root password reset and track VM actions history
Automatic SSH key injection and firewall assignment
